org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders

类 RegistryBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractBuilder<RegistryConfig,RegistryBuilder>
      • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.RegistryBuilder

  • public class RegistryBuilder
extends AbstractBuilder<RegistryConfig,RegistryBuilder>
    This is a builder for build RegistryConfig.
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7
